ab: ma usua hlimiaili mapuahlʉ usua caihli, makarikari a siihuna umahlikua cucumacu pakipuhlu cukahlangʉ cucu’una palungu ngahla.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: rahlua pakisusuahlai umahlikua siihu makikini pakipuhlu cukahlangʉ cucu’u palungu ngahlana alamuru Hlakuta’i savangʉana.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Hlakuta’i savangʉana。
en: I interviewed Noami Kulas, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: hlipitʉtʉrʉaku kana’ana kani’i taluavaʉlana musa saliaisa kana’ana pakisuahlai.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: ma pakisusuahlai pasamiana, kihlamuhlamu a kana’ana ihlaku hliangahlahlana pahlumiamia ngahlaisa, ruavici ihlaku mʉmʉa pautuahlangi cucusaliaisa hla miararumaisa.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: pakisuahlaiaku kana’ana tiaraisa maisukasʉ puliuhlu palungu ngahla, ku i avacangʉ sitakuamia kiariarina?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn't the old registration method sufficient?

ab: umalivalʉ a kana’ana ihlaku, ta’iaraisaka suhlatʉ hlakʉsaiana ku macuisa sipiaʉngʉca ngahlaisa, maarumana usumanʉ pia kana’ana 「撒先生」, kuhlaisai. tam pi sitahliasulua.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「撒先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him "Na Xian Sheng," which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: amihla Hlakuta’i savangʉana, siasuhlatʉ cucumacu ngahlana ia, ihlaisa macuisa sipiangʉngʉca ngahlahlamu, ngahlaku ia hlaka tahlanahlamu, pihlingihlamu, cukahlangʉhlamu cucu’u, ahliki’aiia tumahlaʉ cucutahlana tuahlʉ maitʉahlʉ palungu ngahla takacicihli.
ch: Hlakuta’i savangʉana說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找到自己的名字。」
en: Noami Kulas said, "The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names."
